name: Routon Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Routon Electronic Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and service of electronic terminals in China. The company offers GPS navigation devices, public payphones, e-transaction systems, and public communication terminals. It also operates in South Eastern Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, and South America. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Wuhan, the People's Republic of China.
